title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They have tried resetting their password multiple times.

title: Payment Failed During Checkout
description: Customer reports payment failure when attempting to complete a purchase using a credit card.

title: Delayed Order Delivery
description: Order was expected within 3 days but has not arrived after 7 days.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer returned the product two weeks ago but has not received the refund yet.

title: App Crashes on Startup
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after launching on Android devices.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: Customer was charged twice for the same subscription plan.

title: Unable to Update Profile Information
description: Changes made to profile information are not being saved.

title: Product Received Damaged
description: Customer received a damaged product and is requesting a replacement.

title: Subscription Cancellation Issue
description: Customer is unable to cancel their subscription from the dashboard.

title: Website Loading Very Slowly
description: Customer reports that the website takes more than 30 seconds to load.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving verification and notification emails.

title: Discount Code Not Working
description: Promo code shows invalid even though it is within the validity period.

title: Error 500 on Dashboard
description: Customer encounters server error 500 when accessing the dashboard.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Not Working
description: Customer is not receiving OTP for two-factor authentication.

title: Unable to Upload Documents
description: File upload fails with an unknown error message but still cannot access it.
